statement: Build multiple income streams that run without me, so I can raise my family with total freedom and zero dependence on anyone else's system.

goals.text: Get OFM Agency to $10k/mo revenue with 5+ active creators
Land 3 Kairos AI clients and generate $50K+ in setup revenue
Complete Oaxaca move by May 2026 — house, farm, family settled
Launch Power Independence Academy and hit first sale
